input_text: For 6300_6400 AOS-CX 10.17.1000, what does the graceful-restart command do?
target_value: Enables LDP graceful restart. Graceful restart is enabled by default. With graceful restart enabled, the MPLS forwarding state will be temporarily retained if the control plane restarts. The switch will wait after losing LDP neighbors before deleting bindings from that neighbor. See mpls ldp graceful restart timers for details. Graceful restart is enabled for LDP sessions only when the LDP setting and the overall router setting are enabled. If either is disabled, then graceful restart will not occur for LDP sessions.
